name: erp-system
description: Complete ERP System with React frontend and Node.js backend

scripts.client: cd client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm start
scripts.install-all: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd server && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../client && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.vercel-build: npm run install-all && npm run build

author: ERP System Developer
